trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

trending_videos.title: "Brand New Day" Could Be SENSATIONAL
trending_videos.description:
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/troyoboyo17
Fortnite Creator Code: TROYOBOYO17
Become a Member for $1: https://www.youtube.com/c/troyoboyo17/join
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/troyoboyo17
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/troyoboyo17
Merch: https://troyoboyo17-shop.fourthwall.com

Causes That Matter to Me: https://troyoboyo17.notion.site/With-Great-Power-9b83d5c7e8294dd59cf4e16a099187a0

So, a new trailer just released for Spider-Man: Brand New Day. I’ve been deeply excited for this movie ever since the final moments of No Way Home and how that movie left the character.

     And from everything we’ve seen so far, and from how director Destin Daniel Cretton has been talking about the Wall Crawler, I think that “Brand New Day” is looking to be everything that I’ve wanted out of a Spider-Man movie.

From the return of Scorpion and the introduction of organic webs to the mysterious role of Sadie Sink and the inclusion of Hulk and Punisher. There is A LOT to unpack.

In this video,

anime_and_manga.evidence: MAPPA CHANNEL's Chainsaw Man teaser is trending, indicating a strong interest in anime trailers and new arcs.
anime_and_manga.opportunities: Creating content around popular anime releases, teasers, and reviews could capture significant viewer interest.

pop_culture_and_superheroes.evidence: Videos related to Avengers and Spider-Man are trending, showcasing continued interest in superhero franchises.
pop_culture_and_superheroes.opportunities: Producing breakdowns, theories, and reaction videos for upcoming superhero films and trailers can attract a large audience.

gaming_and_reactions.evidence: MrBeast Gaming's Squid Game video and Maximilian Dood's reaction content are trending, highlighting the appeal of gaming and reaction videos.
gaming_and_reactions.opportunities: Leveraging popular games and creating engaging reaction content or challenges can drive significant engagement.

mystery_and_thrillers.evidence: Content like 'This Serial Killer Was Relentless…' indicates a niche interest in true crime and thriller content.
mystery_and_thrillers.opportunities: Developing content around unsolved mysteries, crime analysis, and thriller storytelling could attract viewers interested in suspenseful narratives.

diversification.evidence: Creators like MrBeast are expanding into gaming, showcasing a trend where creators diversify content to capture multiple audience segments.
diversification.opportunities: Content creators should explore branching into adjacent content categories to increase reach and audience engagement.

international_content.evidence: Chainsaw Man's Japanese teaser indicates a strong international presence in trending videos.
international_content.opportunities: Localizing content for international audiences or creating bilingual content can tap into diverse viewer bases.

cross-platform_promotion.strategy: Utilize platforms like TikTok and Instagram to promote YouTube content, especially for trailers and teasers.
cross-platform_promotion.rationale: Short-form content platforms can drive traffic to YouTube through engaging snippets and teasers.

collaborations.strategy: Collaborate with other popular creators within the same or complementary niches to expand audience reach.
collaborations.rationale: Cross-channel collaborations can introduce creators to new audiences and create shared viewer bases.

timely_releases.strategy: Align content releases with major events or releases in the entertainment industry for maximum impact.
timely_releases.rationale: Releasing content around the time of major film trailers, game releases, or events can increase visibility and engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
